args.sql:
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_Area(omrade) AS parcel_area_m2, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '1601' AND ST_Area(omrade) > 5000

1.description: select parcels in Trondheim (>5000 m²) with geometry and area

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk class values in utlosningomr

3.description: select quick-clay polygons with the identified high risk class

5.description: join parcels (step 1) with quick-clay polygons (step 3) using intersects

6.description: join result (step 5) with counties (step 4) to assign county

7.description: sort by parcel area descending and then limit to 10

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal AS area, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' AND COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal,0) > 5000;

tools.result: {"error": "'matrikkel'"}
